parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded live-action footage for the main narrative with an AI-generated avatar for the tutor. The AI avatar exhibits typical synthetic traits like perfectly smooth skin, static framing, and slightly unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Male in his 20s with a medium build and brown complexion. He has short black hair, a mustache, and wears rectangular glasses.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a light blue t-shirt and a light blue half-helmet throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Female in her 20s with a slim build and brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back in a low ponytail.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a black button-down shirt and loose black trousers with a white side stripe.
characters.demeanor: Initially stressed and frustrated, later curious and impressed.

characters.appearance: Female AI avatar with a slim build and brown complexion. She has dark hair neatly pulled back and highly symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a dark blazer over a light-colored collared shirt.

scenes.setting: Outdoor residential complex, daytime, paved road, bushes, building in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B is standing on the right side of the frame, holding a smartphone to her ear and looking distressed. Character A is sitting on a purple scooter on the left side, looking down at his smartphone. Character B lowers her phone, turns to Character A, and speaks to him. Character A looks up and holds up his index finger, gesturing for her to wait a moment.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot showing a delivery driver on his scooter and a customer standing nearby. The customer finishes a frustrating phone call and asks the driver for an OTP. The driver asks for a minute as he is busy on his phone. Text overlays translate their conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: 4th interview ittu. HR heludru English weak ide. Modlu English kali illa job sigalla anta heludru. [It was my 4th interview. HR said my English is weak. They said learn English first or you won't get a job.]
Character B says: Anna, OTP 4062. [Brother, OTP 4062.]
Character A says: Madam, just 1 minute. [Madam, just 1 minute.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
4th interview ittu (4th interview ittu)
HR heludru (HR heludru)
English weak ide (English weak ide)
modlu English kali illa (modlu English kali illa)
job sigalla anta heludru. (job sigalla anta heludru.)
Anna (Anna)
OTP 4062 (OTP 4062)
madam, just 1 minute. (madam, just 1 minute.)

scenes.setting: Split screen. Top: Abstract blurred background. Bottom: Outdoor residential complex.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C is looking directly at the camera with a neutral, professional expression. The background behind her is a blurred, abstract office-like setting with muted tones.

Character A is sitting on his purple scooter, holding a smartphone in his left hand. He is looking at the screen and speaking. Character B stands behind him to the right, watching him with a surprised expression.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout. The top half shows the AI tutor avatar listening. The bottom half shows the delivery driver speaking fluent English into his phone, while the customer watches him in surprise. Text overlays display his English speech.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent this days. Thank you. [Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you.]

and now I can see my English (and now I can see my English)
has become very fluent this days. (has become very fluent this days.)

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A turns his head to the right to speak to Character B. Character B looks interested and asks him a question. Character A gestures with his right hand as he explains something to her, looking earnest and helpful.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot of the driver and customer. The customer asks how he learned English, and the driver enthusiastically explains that he uses an AI teacher app that saved his job. Text overlays translate their conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Neevu yarinda English kalitiddira? [Who are you learning English from?]
Character A says: Madam SpeakX na AI English teacher inda. Nanu actually kelsa kalkombekaytu adre ee teacher save madidru. [Madam, from SpeakX's AI English teacher. I was actually about to lose my job but this teacher saved me.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with dark hair is smiling gently at the camera. She is wearing a light-colored top. The background behind her is a blurred, warm-toned indoor setting.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone screen displaying the AI avatar in a circular profile picture format. Below the avatar are app UI elements like a microphone button and chat text. The driver's voiceover explains his practice routine.

Character A says: Houdu madam. Nanu free irbekadre pratidina hatrinda hadinaidu nimisha practice madtini. [Yes madam. Whenever I am free, I practice for 10 to 15 minutes every day.]

scenes.visual_description: A close-up of hands holding a smartphone and scrolling through a grid of different learning modules within the app. The driver's voiceover describes the app's effectiveness for children.

scenes.visual_description: The customer asks about the price, and the driver explains the cheap trial offer. Convinced, she asks him to download the app on her phone. Text overlays show their conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Houda, kaliyokke esht dud agutte? [Is it? How much does it cost to learn?]
Character A says: Madam just eradu roopayige elu dina trial ide. [Madam, there is a 7-day trial for just two rupees.]
Character B says: Houda, ashtena anna? Thank you. Nan phone allu app download madkodi please. [Is it, just that much brother? Thank you. Please download the app on my phone too.]
